Feedback.Title: First Post
Feedback.Body: This is the first post. I hope you enjoy it!

Feedback.Title: Second Post
Feedback.Body: This is the second post with more detailed feedback. Let me know what you think about the new UI!

Feedback.Title: Feature Request
Feedback.Body: I would love to see a dark mode toggle added to the application. It would make the UI even more user-friendly.

Feedback.Title: Bug Report
Feedback.Body: There seems to be a small issue when submitting forms. Please check the validation logic.

Feedback.Title: Performance Feedback
Feedback.Body: The app feels much faster after the latest update. Page transitions are smoother and loading times are reduced!

Feedback.Title: UI Appreciation
Feedback.Body: The new layout looks clean and modern. The spacing, colors, and typography are on point. Great job!

Feedback.Title: Database Issue
Feedback.Body: I noticed some duplicate entries being stored in the database. It might be worth adding a uniqueness check.

Feedback.Title: New Feature Suggestion
Feedback.Body: It would be amazing if we could filter feedback posts by date or category. This would improve navigation.

Feedback.Title: Notification Request
Feedback.Body: Please add email or push notifications when new feedback is posted. It would help in staying updated.

Feedback.Title: Major Update Review
Feedback.Body: The latest major release is fantastic. The performance, UI, and features have all improved significantly.

Feedback.Title: TN Elections
Feedback.Body: Suryaprakash to become the next Chief Minister of TamilNadu
